title: Weberbauera bracteata
taxonomy: Weberbauera bracteata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. This classification places it within the Brassicales order of flowering plants. The plant's position within the Brassicaceae family is further supported by its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis.
